items.title: S01E01 - Now, Dr. Upton
items.summary: A newly-qualified Michael Upton is released into the world of work. But finding the ideal job proves more difficult than it originally seemed.

infolabels.title: Now, Dr. Upton
infolabels.plot: A newly-qualified Michael Upton is released into the world of work. But finding the ideal job proves more difficult than it originally seemed.

items.title: S01E02 - You've Really Landed Me In It This Time
items.summary: Michael is subjected to spending an evening in the company of a sex-starved secretary when he stands in for a skiving Paul.

infolabels.title: You've Really Landed Me In It This Time
infolabels.plot: Michael is subjected to spending an evening in the company of a sex-starved secretary when he stands in for a skiving Paul.

items.title: S01E03 - You Make Me Feel So Young
items.summary: Michael and Paul become partners in Doctor Maxwell's practice. But they find getting accepted by the patients much harder than getting accepted by Doctor Maxwell...

infolabels.title: You Make Me Feel So Young
infolabels.plot: Michael and Paul become partners in Doctor Maxwell's practice. But they find getting accepted by the patients much harder than getting accepted by Doctor Maxwell...

items.title: S01E04 - Doctor Dish
items.summary: Michael is asked to give a talk at the local girls' school. However, he finds it isn't just his medical knowledge that finds favour with the pupils.

infolabels.title: Doctor Dish
infolabels.plot: Michael is asked to give a talk at the local girls' school. However, he finds it isn't just his medical knowledge that finds favour with the pupils.

items.title: S01E05 - Modernising Major
items.summary: Paul and Michael decide the practice is behind the times and in need of revamping.

infolabels.title: Modernising Major
infolabels.plot: Paul and Michael decide the practice is behind the times and in need of revamping.

items.title: S01E06 - Congratulations, It's A Toad
items.summary: Paul thinks he has stumbled on a winner by using toads for quick and efficient pregnancy tests.

infolabels.title: Congratulations, It's A Toad
infolabels.plot: Paul thinks he has stumbled on a winner by using toads for quick and efficient pregnancy tests.

items.title: S01E07 - Change Your Partners
items.summary: Sue is left unimpressed when Dick introduces Michael to his attractive lady friend.

infolabels.title: Change Your Partners
infolabels.plot: Sue is left unimpressed when Dick introduces Michael to his attractive lady friend.

items.title: S01E08 - Trains And Notes And Veins
items.summary: Michael invites Dick and Paul home to meet his parents. But having four doctors on the premises soon gets irksome.

infolabels.title: Trains And Notes And Veins
infolabels.plot: Michael invites Dick and Paul home to meet his parents. But having four doctors on the premises soon gets irksome.

items.title: S01E09 - Lock, Stock And Beryl
items.summary: Michael's invovement with a nurse called Beryl escalates - much to his displeasure.

infolabels.title: Lock, Stock And Beryl
infolabels.plot: Michael's invovement with a nurse called Beryl escalates - much to his displeasure.

items.title: S01E10 - Upton Sells Out
items.summary: A position becomes vacant at the private practice where Dick works, and Michael - tired of his tedious casualty job - decides to apply for it, leaving Paul unimpressed.

infolabels.title: Upton Sells Out
infolabels.plot: A position becomes vacant at the private practice where Dick works, and Michael - tired of his tedious casualty job - decides to apply for it, leaving Paul unimpressed.

items.title: S01E11 - Saturday Matinee
items.summary: Michael is left in charge of the practice when Dick skives off to see a girlfriend.

infolabels.title: Saturday Matinee
infolabels.plot: Michael is left in charge of the practice when Dick skives off to see a girlfriend.

items.title: S01E12 - Where There's A Will
items.summary: Michael is less than delighted when one of his patients dies shortly after he treats him.

infolabels.title: Where There's A Will
infolabels.plot: Michael is less than delighted when one of his patients dies shortly after he treats him.

items.title: S01E13 - Students At Heart
items.summary: Michael continues his quest for a job in surgery. However, once again he is up against Lawrence Bingham.

infolabels.title: Students At Heart
infolabels.plot: Michael continues his quest for a job in surgery. However, once again he is up against Lawrence Bingham.

items.title: S01E14 - No Ill Feeling!
items.summary: Paul gets Michael a job with his uncle in general practice. But Mike still longs for the surgeon's scalpel.

infolabels.title: No Ill Feeling!
infolabels.plot: Paul gets Michael a job with his uncle in general practice. But Mike still longs for the surgeon's scalpel.

items.title: S01E15 - Let's Start At The Beginning
items.summary: Glad to get away from his G. P. job, Michael visits Dick at his psychiatric practice.

infolabels.title: Let's Start At The Beginning
infolabels.plot: Glad to get away from his G. P. job, Michael visits Dick at his psychiatric practice.

items.title: S01E16 - It's All In The Mind
items.summary: Paul and Michael are pleased when their patients are healing well. But they soon discover it is not entirely due to their efforts...

infolabels.title: It's All In The Mind
infolabels.plot: Paul and Michael are pleased when their patients are healing well. But they soon discover it is not entirely due to their efforts...

items.title: S01E17 - Cynthia Darling
items.summary: Michael is driven to distraction by an overbearing mother's insistence that her healthy daughter is ill.

infolabels.title: Cynthia Darling
infolabels.plot: Michael is driven to distraction by an overbearing mother's insistence that her healthy daughter is ill.

items.title: S01E18 - A little Help From My Friends
items.summary: With Dr. Griffin admitted to hospital, Michael is left in charge of the practice. Dissatisfied with Paul's work, Mike decides to replace him.

infolabels.title: A little Help From My Friends
infolabels.plot: With Dr. Griffin admitted to hospital, Michael is left in charge of the practice. Dissatisfied with Paul's work, Mike decides to replace him.

items.title: S01E19 - Devon Is Lovely at This Time of Year
items.summary: Michael is totally smitten with the new doctor, Nicky. And when the Dean offers Mike a new job, it looks as though he might make a mistake he'll live to regret.

infolabels.title: Devon Is Lovely at This Time of Year
infolabels.plot: Michael is totally smitten with the new doctor, Nicky. And when the Dean offers Mike a new job, it looks as though he might make a mistake he'll live to regret.

items.title: S01E20 - Operation Loftus
items.summary: Michael's much-awaited return to St. Swithin's is cause for celebration. The festivities are quickly curtailed, however, when Professor Loftus also returns to the hospital.

infolabels.title: Operation Loftus
infolabels.plot: Michael's much-awaited return to St. Swithin's is cause for celebration. The festivities are quickly curtailed, however, when Professor Loftus also returns to the hospital.

items.title: S01E22 - A Jokes A Joke
items.summary: Paul and Mike decide to get jobs as anatomy demonstrators, whilst Dick's just in it for the money. However, none of them counted on Lawrence Bingham's competition.

infolabels.title: A Jokes A Joke
infolabels.plot: Paul and Mike decide to get jobs as anatomy demonstrators, whilst Dick's just in it for the money. However, none of them counted on Lawrence Bingham's competition.

items.title: S01E23 - Pull The Other One
items.summary: Michael and Paul find they have differing attitudes to women.

infolabels.title: Pull The Other One
infolabels.plot: Michael and Paul find they have differing attitudes to women.

items.title: S01E24 - It's The Rich Wot Gets The Pleasure
items.summary: Dick finds out he has inherited £50,000 following the death of his Uncle James.

infolabels.title: It's The Rich Wot Gets The Pleasure
infolabels.plot: Dick finds out he has inherited £50,000 following the death of his Uncle James.

items.title: S01E25 - Things That Go Mump In The Night
items.summary: Michael is showing all the symptoms of mumps, and is immediately admitted to Lawrence Bingham's ward.

infolabels.title: Things That Go Mump In The Night
infolabels.plot: Michael is showing all the symptoms of mumps, and is immediately admitted to Lawrence Bingham's ward.

items.title: S01E26 - Mr Moon
items.summary: Michael visits Dick at the health farm at which he is working, and makes a bet that he can stick to the patients' diet.

infolabels.title: Mr Moon
infolabels.plot: Michael visits Dick at the health farm at which he is working, and makes a bet that he can stick to the patients' diet.

items.title: S01E27 - The Viva
items.summary: The junior doctors are all preparing for their viva exams, but one of them in particular has particular trouble when it comes to taking his.

infolabels.plot: The junior doctors are all preparing for their viva exams, but one of them in particular has particular trouble when it comes to taking his.

items.title: S01E28 - Bewigged, Bothered And Bewildered
items.summary: Michael ends up in court after he injects a patient with some penicillin, to which he turns out to be allergic.

infolabels.title: Bewigged, Bothered And Bewildered
infolabels.plot: Michael ends up in court after he injects a patient with some penicillin, to which he turns out to be allergic.
